name: covcom
author: xero (https://x-e.ro)
description: COVCOM: Covert communications for private group conversations. Invite, talk, close the client, and the chat vanishes. Every message is encrypted with XChaCha20 and signed with Ed25519. A BLAKE3 fingerprint on each key allows peers to verify one another. SPQR's manual and epoch ratchets add forward secrecy, while post-quantum ML-KEM-768 encapsulation keeps recorded communications unreadable and secure against future cryptanalysis.

scripts.test: bun run test:server && bun run test:lib && bun run test:web && bun run test:cli
scripts.test:all: bun run test:server && bun run test:lib && bun run test:web && bun run test:cli && bun run test:e2e
scripts.typecheck: bunx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p lib/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p server/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p web/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p web/tsconfig.tools.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p web/test/e2e/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p web/test/cross/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p cli/tsconfig.json
scripts.bake: bun build:web && bun bundle:cli && bun build:cli:all
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun typecheck && bun bake && bun run test:all
